summary: Phase 3 Sprint 2 - Agency Dashboard testing complete. All features working correctly. Backend API /api/dashboard/agency-today returns valid JSON with today_tasks, counters, today_kpi, recent_activity. Agency users see the new Agency Dashboard at /app with all 4 blocks. Admin users see standard dashboard (backward compatibility verified). No React console errors.

minor.issue: 400 errors in console during page loads (non-blocking, likely tenant/auth related - same as iteration_149)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend API /api/dashboard/agency-today correctly returns {ok, data, meta} envelope
user_name in recent_activity properly serialized as string (not object) - fixes 'Objects are not valid as React child' error
DashboardRouter in coreRoutes.jsx correctly routes agency users to AgencyDashboardPage
resolvePersona() correctly identifies agency_admin/agency_agent roles as 'agency' persona
All 4 dashboard blocks have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Quick action buttons navigate to correct URLs
Mini weekly summary displays day names correctly (Paz, Sal, Çar, Per, Cum)
KPI cards show proper Turkish locale formatting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Sprint 2 Agency Dashboard complete. All persona-based routing working. Agency dashboard shows 4 blocks: Bugün Yapılacaklar, KPI Strip, Hızlı Aksiyonlar, Son Aktivite + Haftalık Özet. Admin sees standard Yönetim Panosu dashboard.

features_verified.backend_api_agency_today: PASSED - GET /api/dashboard/agency-today returns valid JSON with today_tasks, counters, today_kpi, recent_activity
features_verified.agency_login_dashboard: PASSED - agency1@demo.test sees new Agency Dashboard at /app
features_verified.mini_weekly_summary: PASSED - data-testid='mini-weekly-summary' present with day names
features_verified.admin_backward_compatibility: PASSED - admin@acenta.test does NOT see agency dashboard, sees Yönetim Panosu
features_verified.no_react_console_errors: PASSED - No 'Objects are not valid as React child' errors
features_verified.kpi_turkish_locale: PASSED - KPI cards show proper Turkish formatting (₺, adet, bugün)
features_verified.user_name_serialization: PASSED - user_name in recent_activity is string, not object

console_observations: 400 errors on some API calls (non-blocking, same as iteration_149)
No 'Objects are not valid as React child' errors
